# ParaSwap

> ParaSwap, now Velora, is a non-custodial EVM trading protocol for quoting, routing, and settling swaps from your wallet.

## Key facts
- Type: DEX aggregator / intents
- Networks: Ethereum, BNB Chain, Avalanche, Polygon, Gnosis, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Sonic, Unichain
- Custody: Non-custodial — your wallet signs
- Costs: Pool fee + network gas + price impact
- Token in/out: the pair you choose
- Verify: Check the pool and contract in the live app

- [What is ParaSwap?](https://paraswap-app.github.io/#what)
- [How it works](https://paraswap-app.github.io/#how)

- [FAQ](https://paraswap-app.github.io/#faq)
